title: The Beauty of Asymmetric Game Design
excerpt: Exploring games where players have different abilities and goals. How asymmetry creates engaging and replayable experiences.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: Engine Building Mechanics Explained
excerpt: Understanding engine building through the lens of successful games. How to design systems that grow in complexity and power.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: The Art of Cooperative Storytelling
excerpt: How modern board games weave narrative and mechanics together. Legacy games and persistent storytelling in tabletop design.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: Solo Gaming: Playing Alone Together
excerpt: The rise of solo modes in board games and how designers create engaging single-player experiences that feel complete on their own.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: Theme vs Mechanics: Finding the Balance
excerpt: When theme serves mechanics and vice versa. Great games where story and systems work in perfect harmony — and what happens when they don't.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: Gateway Games That Changed Everything
excerpt: The games that introduced millions to modern board gaming and what makes a game accessible yet deeply engaging for newcomers and veterans alike.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: The Psychology of Player Elimination
excerpt: Why player elimination feels bad, how modern designers avoid it, and the rare cases where it actually works beautifully.
author: Sagun Pandey

title: Deck Building — The Game Within the Game
excerpt: How deck building mechanics create a meta-game of construction and optimization that sits elegantly inside the main game loop.
author: Sagun Pandey
